positive: A stylized, minimalist design featuring a central pair of anthropomorphic celestial creatures – one resembling a whimsical, winged lion (Leo) and the other, a serpentine nebula dragon (Draco). They are depicted in a dynamic, embracing pose, intertwined with flowing cosmic elements like swirling galaxies, crescent moons, and constellations. The overall aesthetic should be highly graphic, utilizing a limited, powerful color palette of deep sapphire blue, ethereal gold, and matte black. The composition must emphasize clean silhouettes and strong, defined outlines, suitable for screen printing on fabric. Include subtle bioluminescent details and sharp, geometric starburst accents. Art Deco illustration meets cosmic vaporwave.
negative: text, watermark, signature, blurry, low resolution, ugly, artifact, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, poorly drawn hands, poor composition, logo, trademark, copyright, messy lines, gradient wash, photo, realistic
